case_title: ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR VS CENTRAL BUSINESS FORMS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL BUSINESS FORMS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,344.90 FILED BY ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL BUSINESS FORMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL BUSINESS FORMS $772.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $772.50, DUE BY 6/1/92 SETLEMENT REACHED BY BOTH PARTIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
